creator: jeh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please re-submit this PR.  This submission:
1) Uses the "old layout".
2) Used the old PKGNAME variable
3) README.html is not part of the port, it can be created by the user
4) It fails portlint miserably.  ports/devel/portlint

Jim
